title: Muffin's Structures
description: Adds several vanilla-like structures to the game
body:
![An ominous house in the Pale Garden](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PVqKukWm/images/c3db660a96a4f43209749686915428e804880c2c.png)

Adds several structures to the game that are designed to fit in seamlessly with vanilla structures for a better overall experience while exploring worlds. Some structures, such as wells and statues, can contain secret loot when mined. The loot found in each structure is balanced so as to not affect game progression.

Current Structures:
- Oak Tower
- Campsite
- Cherry Pagoda
- Pale House
- Mangrove Swamp Hut
- Badlands Pyramid
- Oak Shed
- Villager Statue
- Mushroom Hut
- Creeper Statue
- Well

Planned Structures:
- More Tower Variants
- Abandoned Farms
- More Shed Variants
- More Statues
- And more!
